// 0x2b92: ProcessType[[]string.array]

	Call a7 2d 00 00 // ProcessType[string]
	ProcessSliceDataRepeat 10 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x2b9e: ProcessType[[]uint8]
	ProcessSlice 99 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x2ba8: ProcessType[[]uintptr]
	ProcessSlice 9b 00 00 00 08 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x2bb2: ProcessType[[]val<main.bigStruct>]
	ProcessArrayDataPrep 40 00 00 00 
	Call 94 2a 00 00 // ProcessType[*main.bigStruct]
	ProcessSliceDataRepeat 08 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x2bc2: ProcessType[[]val<map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	ProcessArrayDataPrep 40 00 00 00 
	Call b3 2c 00 00 // ProcessType[map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument]
	ProcessSliceDataRepeat 08 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x2bd2: ProcessType[bucket<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 88 00 00 00 
	Call 4c 2a 00 00 // ProcessType[*bucket<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x2bdd: ProcessType[bucket<string,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 08 00 00 00 
	Call 78 2b 00 00 // ProcessType[[]key<string>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 40 00 00 00 
	Call 52 2a 00 00 // ProcessType[*bucket<string,int>]
	Return 
// 0x2bf2: ProcessType[bucket<string,main.bigStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 08 00 00 00 
	Call 78 2b 00 00 // ProcessType[[]key<string>]
	Call b2 2b 00 00 // ProcessType[[]val<main.bigStruct>]
	Call 58 2a 00 00 // ProcessType[*bucket<string,main.bigStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x2c07: ProcessType[bucket<string,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 08 00 00 00 
	Call 78 2b 00 00 // ProcessType[[]key<string>]
	Call c2 2b 00 00 // ProcessType[[]val<map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Call 5e 2a 00 00 // ProcessType[*bucket<string,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x2c1c: ProcessType[bucket<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call c2 2b 00 00 // ProcessType[[]val<map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Call 64 2a 00 00 // ProcessType[*bucket<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x2c2c: ProcessType[error]
	ProcessGoInterface 
	Return 
// 0x2c2e: ProcessType[go.shape.string]
	ProcessString b6 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x2c34: ProcessType[hash<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	ProcessGoHmap bb 00 00 00 90 00 00 00 08 09 10 18 
	Return 
// 0x2c42: ProcessType[hash<string,int>]
	ProcessGoHmap a4 00 00 00 d0 00 00 00 08 09 10 18 
	Return 
// 0x2c50: ProcessType[hash<string,main.bigStruct>]
	ProcessGoHmap a8 00 00 00 d0 00 00 00 08 09 10 18

// 0x2c6c: ProcessType[hash<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]

// 0x2c7a: ProcessType[main.condFields]
